textByHashes.1f03e37c7be5c46239f279d6fc8490ed05c578fa: Why, yes I am. Why do you ask?
textByHashes.10ffc481df1c7ab6be6442830adc50188f2e162b: Well I can tell by the look on your face that I'm not the first person you've asked. Why don't you tell me what you've heard from other members of the group so far?
textByHashes.4d85dcaaed273a1b36a62e4430199bb9a2597928: Did you ever consider that all those theories might be correct?
textByHashes.53e654989302de825463156a2c258c4cf528519e: I'll let you into a little secret that'll explain it all to you. In a word - fairies!
textByHashes.3da678186903d57445e7afe09e7b3c24a99782eb: Think it through. There are fairies who control everything natural from the weather to the seasons.
